title: The 200-Year-Old Ancient Subway

scenes.text: An underground antiquity hints at lost technology beneath the city.
These ancient tunnels were discovered in Beijing, China.
Dating back to the 19th century, the tunnels suggest advanced engineering.
What civilization constructed this forgotten transport system?
scenes.label: A FORGOTTEN INNOVATION

scenes.text: Follow if you can't stop asking why.

description: 📍 Beijing, China - 2003. An underground tunnel system over 200 years old was unearthed, showcasing advanced engineering from a bygone era. Follow for daily mysteries!
